mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.sender_employee_id, e.name AS sender_name, m.body, m.sent_at FROM chat_messages m INNER JOIN employees e ON e.id = m.sender_employee_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.sent_at ASC, m.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages ( room_id, sender_employee_id, body, sent_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{senderEmployeeId}, #{body}, #{sentAt} )
